包含但不限于以下内容。
花生米质检员：奖励发配战场中心
关公战秦琼：什么叫阿瓦达索命vs别天神，又什么叫Saber大战Saber（圣刃）
苇名剑圣：大人，时代变了。
挥石法师：怎么挥石呢？是啊怎么挥石呢？
优秀毕业生：这是我们雷亚卢卡利亚学院的挥石法杖，看看你们霍格沃茨的。
型月秩序恶：孩子们别怕，我已经把那些混沌善的“爱人王”全收拾了。
校园恋爱轻喜剧（？）：你最好是
基沃托斯教师：不好，我的教资！！！
忠诚派：泰拉不去，我说了泰拉不去。
无尽能源：什么叫擎天柱和赛尔号一起回到地球了？
漂泊者/指挥官：什么叫按5使用传识？
日轻厕纸异世界大乱斗：你也是勇者，他也是勇者，高中生全都是勇者！
接一切世界意志修正，历史修正性打手，主角团磨刀石，戒指里的老爷爷，被挖至尊骨的弃子的护道者，勇者记忆中强大的前辈，可能性之兽，红色厨师，蓝色莽子，双射手指挥者，主角团搞笑役，空中证婚人，主线剧情里造成灾难的罪魁祸首等office
泰拉不去，我说泰拉不去！哪个泰拉都不去。
本书绝无BE，到过的世界，必然会被搞成包饺子大团圆！
……
ok，整备完成，下一个世界","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ai/dc25ce072816a2d5f43b40a196354cb3~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"峯岚","author_id":"","book_id":"7548745590734081049","book_name":"无限：什么叫系统就是我自己？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#404850","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7548748329077719577","read_count":"406","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"782624"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"221","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,系统,穿越,综漫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/dc25ce072816a2d5f43b40a196354cb3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779437165&x-signature=mheGZ0hmoMJ4HKDDrD49CYB5XYQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3226422057642394","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"141"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032316060596C2C75946BF7FAFE983"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9613,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":219},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1774208208,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7620129886982570777","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可以打发时间看看，但是文笔方面略显小白，比较僵硬尤其是禁林那段有点尬住了，不是剧情的问题，而是文笔撑不起来导致的，另外给了那个玛蒂菈太多描写，说实话很没有必要，反而让人感官恶化了，可能作者是真的对这个角色有偏爱，但这种强行加戏只会不断败坏读者对她的好感，看着甚至感觉她才是主角了，当前世界的主角和男主存在感都给削没了，强行忍着继续看，结果后面还在一直出现，小说都快变成玛蒂菈的一己之见了，希望可以注意一下"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1774207134,"group_id":"7548745590734081049","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6rPCFQ1TTjeLy3RjWWc/dt+aWTO2Lw0htLll2SdETXF","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/243f6e8b269d4634a079d4eacd202941~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792741&x-signature=%2Ft4gXIIxnvKZx6ANv9kw%2FbBWPus%3D","user_id":"2490826544125411","user_name":"注孤生的冰魔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2490826544125411","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7548745590734081049","book_info":{"abstract":"【综漫泛ACG+诸天无限+沙雕乐子文+多女主（倾向原创）+综漫包饺子剧情】
